title: Vapeaholic
description: Adds vapes that can be used for short bursts of potion effects!
body:
_This Mod Is Still In Development_
# Vapeaholic
This mod adds vapes that can be used with a variety of potions!

There are 16 different colors that you can dye your vape!

 

Not all potions are currently available

All Curently Available Potion Types:

- Night Vision     
- Invisibility         
- Jump Boost      
- Fire Resistance
- Swiftness         
- Slowness         
 
Water Pods Can also be inserted into a vape if you don't want any potion effects!

 

## Simple Guide to Vapeaholic
 


Needed Components:
 

- Mouthpiece

![Mouthpiece Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6095d9483e4aac97326d35a07d11a8cca6e30aee.png)

 

- Coil

![Coil Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/090d1f1d80881cd3f19f2cfa59f5d139f2de8f8e.png)
 

- Battery

![Battery Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8e5184ef9889735f4644e3bf993f1016ff1aa7f.png)
 

## Assembly

**Vape Recipe:**
 
![Vape Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b61f69251328c5e255c74e8b595706040d9b4828.png)

**Vape Pod Recipe:**

![Vape Pod Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6cd65ac1d8bd6fcc6cfcb5e773ac7a408ab1f56.png)

**Water Filled Pod Recipe:**

![Water Filled Pod Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01c1e9f03b9076774cc28a30528714a6dfa81975.png)

 

The potions are brewed the same way as vanilla minecraft, but instead using vape pods!


### Insterting Pods:
To use a vape pod in a vape, Put the desired pod next to your vape in a crafting table
 

**Ex:**

![Insterting A Pod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9797ab30ff609b780a66f00a131e7915f8be9bf.png)


 

Have Fun!
